# /status

> Utility command. Prints a one-screen status board for the feature.

## Usage

```
/status [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--all]
```

- `--all` prints status for every feature under `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/`.

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/.workflow.json`
- `projects/{p}/_handoffs/*.handoff.json` (filtered to involve this feature)
- Optionally `projects/{p}/d365-ce/{fdd,tdd,blueprint}.md` for whether the feature has been added

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature(s); load workflow state + handoffs.
2. Print:
   - **Phase**: DEFINE / DESIGN / BUILD
   - **Current states**: list
   - **Gates**: each gate with status (APPROVED / PENDING) and timestamp
   - **Cross-agent dependencies**: from `.workflow.json dependencies[]`, with READY / BLOCKED / WAITING
   - **Domain doc presence**: yes/no for fdd / tdd / blueprint sections tagged with this feature-id
   - **Recent history**: last 5 command runs from `.workflow.json history[]`
3. No file writes; no state changes.

## Example output

```
Feature: case-management
Project: acme-d365-2026
Phase: BUILD
Current states: IMPLEMENTING, FDD_DRAFT, TDD_DRAFT, BLUEPRINT_DRAFT

Gates:
  SPEC_APPROVED       APPROVED  2026-05-13 14:22  user
  PLAN_CLARIFIED      APPROVED  2026-05-14 09:15  user
  TASK_VALIDATED      APPROVED  2026-05-15 11:02  user

Dependencies:
  integration / case-management / blueprint    READY (2026-05-13 18:00)
  reporting / case-management / spec-seed      BLOCKED (downstream /spec pending)

Domain docs:
  fdd.md    section "case-management" present
  tdd.md    section "case-management" present
  blueprint.md  section "case-management" present

Recent history:
  /spec --feature case-management --source fresh    ok      2026-05-13 12:00
  /review --approve                                 ok      2026-05-13 14:22
  /plan                                             ok      2026-05-13 16:40
  /clarify --approve                                ok      2026-05-14 09:15
  /task                                             ok      2026-05-14 14:30
```
